summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GERdoctor iteration 16 features. All three requested features are working correctly: 1) LOGOUT BUG FIXED - single click logout works for demo user, admin, and partner (redirects to landing/login and clears authentication), 2) PARTNER DETAIL DIALOG - shows user name, email, submitted date, status, step progress with completion percentage, progress bar, all step rows with number/title/type/status/data, and Complete button for non-completed steps, 3) DESKTOP AUTO-SCROLL - active step card scrolls into view on page load (verified with scrollLeft=692 when user is on step 6).
passed_tests: LOGOUT BUG: Demo user single-click logout redirects to /login and clears auth
LOGOUT BUG: Admin single-click logout redirects to /login and clears auth
LOGOUT BUG: Partner single-click logout redirects to /login and clears auth
PARTNER API: GET /api/partner/users/{user_id} returns user step data (200)
PARTNER API: GET /api/partner/users/{user_id} returns 403 for non-submitted user
PARTNER API: PUT /api/partner/users/{user_id}/progress updates step status (200)
PARTNER API: PUT /api/partner/users/{user_id}/progress returns 403 for non-submitted user
PARTNER API: Regular user cannot access partner endpoints (401/403)
PARTNER API: Unauthenticated cannot access partner endpoints (401)
PARTNER DETAIL: Dialog shows User Name (Chris)
PARTNER DETAIL: Dialog shows Email (cg@digifort.info)
PARTNER DETAIL: Dialog shows Submitted date and Status
PARTNER DETAIL: Dialog shows Step Progress section with completion percentage
PARTNER DETAIL: Dialog shows progress bar
PARTNER DETAIL: Dialog shows 8 step rows with data-testid
PARTNER DETAIL: Step rows show step number, title, type, status badge
PARTNER DETAIL: Step rows show step data (selected partner name: ILS)
PARTNER DETAIL: Complete button appears on non-completed steps
PARTNER DETAIL: Complete button click updates status and shows toast
DESKTOP SCROLL: Step bar auto-scrolls to active step on load (scrollLeft=692 for step 6)
seed_data_creation: Temporarily modified Chris's step 3 and step 6 to pending status to test Complete button and auto-scroll features, then restored
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 added three features: 1) Logout bug fix - AuthContext now uses useRef(tokenRef) instead of useState(token) to prevent checkAuth re-trigger on logout. 2) Partner Dashboard submission detail dialog now shows full user step data with progress bar, completion percentage, step rows with data-testid='detail-step-{order}', and Complete button with data-testid='complete-step-{order}' for non-completed steps. New backend endpoints: GET /api/partner/users/{user_id} and PUT /api/partner/users/{user_id}/progress. 3) Desktop step bar auto-scrolls active step into view using desktopStepRefs and scrollIntoView. All features working correctly.
screenshots: .screenshots/partner_detail_dialog.png - Partner detail dialog showing user info and step progress
.screenshots/partner_detail_with_complete_btn.png - Dialog showing Complete button on pending step
.screenshots/partner_detail_after_complete.png - Dialog after clicking Complete with toast
.screenshots/demo_dashboard_step6_autoscroll.png - Desktop dashboard with auto-scroll to step 6
